stages.description: Read source script and oral video metadata.
Create script units and subtitle cues from source script and audio/manual timing.
Plan readable subtitle layout beats before visual shot compilation.
Create semantic shot plan and visual roles.
Materialize lawful local B-roll assets with source evidence.
Compile base plate from talking-head and B-roll timeline rows.
Materialize sanitized local SVG semantic icons for transparent motion overlays.
Render real motion overlay artifacts for subtitle-timed logic segments.
Generate SRT/ASS subtitles and deterministic layout evidence.
Generate probe render and representative validation frames.
Render final video, QC frames, edit package, and production acceptance.
